permissions.name: admin:console:access
permissions.description: Open the admin console shell and shared workspace chrome.

permissions.name: admin:monitoring:read
permissions.description: Read platform, tenant and operational monitoring surfaces.

permissions.name: admin:org:read
permissions.description: Read tenant-scoped admin data, pages and exports.

permissions.name: admin:users:read
permissions.description: Read tenant user directories and membership metadata.

permissions.name: admin:users:write
permissions.description: Invite, change role, deactivate and reactivate tenant users.

permissions.name: admin:billing:read
permissions.description: Read billing plans, history and finance-facing summaries.

permissions.name: admin:billing:write
permissions.description: Change plan or mutate billing-facing control-plane settings.

permissions.name: admin:audit:read
permissions.description: Read append-only audit and journal surfaces.

permissions.name: admin:onboarding:read
permissions.description: Read onboarding state and supporting tenant activation data.

permissions.name: admin:onboarding:write
permissions.description: Advance onboarding steps and mutate onboarding state.

permissions.name: admin:messages:read
permissions.description: Read admin conversations, support threads and inbox counts.

permissions.name: admin:messages:write
permissions.description: Reply to admin conversations or mutate message state.

permissions.name: admin:support:write
permissions.description: Mutate support workflows and contact-request status.

permissions.name: admin:integrations:read
permissions.description: Read integration catalog, connection status, sync runs and raw events.

permissions.name: admin:integrations:write
permissions.description: Mutate integration connections, credentials, syncs and write-back configuration.
